rules: Never use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-900 (#0f172a).
Backgrounds must be solid white or very pale slate (#f8fafc).
Gradients are FORBIDDEN except for subtle hover states.
Shadows should be sharp and minimal (e.g., shadow-sm), not diffused and large.

typography.instructions: Import 'Chivo', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts in index.css.

layout.spacing: Tailwind standard scale but doubled for 'breathing room' (e.g., p-8 instead of p-4).
layout.container_style: Grid Borders: No cards with shadows. Use visible 1px borders (border-collapse) to separate data sections.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 font-medium tracking-wide transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all

inputs.classes: rounded-none border-border focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary bg-transparent

upload_zone.classes: border-2 border-dashed border-border hover:border-brand-accent/50 bg-slate-50/50 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors p-12 text-center cursor-pointer

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used ONLY for sticky headers: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-border/50.

matplotlib_styles.instruction: Since charts are static images from backend, styling must be applied in Python/Matplotlib code.

hero_background.description: Abstract white geometric low poly background
hero_background.usage: Use as a subtle background for the 'Upload' or 'Hero' section with low opacity (e.g., opacity-30) and mix-blend-multiply.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do not use 'Inter'. Use 'IBM Plex Sans' and 'Chivo'.
CRITICAL: The theme is LIGHT ONLY. Remove any dark mode toggles.
Layout Strategy: Use 'Grid Borders'. Instead of cards with shadows, use divs with 'border border-border' to create a spreadsheet-like density.
Matplotlib: You must instruct the backend to generate charts that match the frontend colors. Pass the hex codes to the backend or configure matplotlib rcParams.
Upload Page: Make the dropzone huge (p-20). It's the main action.
Dashboard: Use a 'Bento' layout. Summary stats at top, large chart in middle, detailed issues list at bottom.
Data Tables: Use dense rows. 'py-2 px-4'. Font 'JetBrains Mono' for numbers.
Accessibility: Ensure text contrast is > 4.5:1. The primary blue #2563eb on white is safe.
universal_guidelines: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Every interactive element must have a data-testid.
